rel_16_summary: Dib-u-dhis bogga hore oo Afrika horreysiisa, gelitaanka nambarka telefoonka, tusaale tooshiye ah oo firfircoon oo abka shaqaalaha ah, iyo tirtiridda laanta ee Iibinta Goobta (POS).
rel_16_change_0: Isku diiwaangeli oo gal adigoo isticmaalaya nambarkaaga telefoonka iyo koodh SMS oo keliya — email looma baahna. Koodhka wadankaaga ayaa horay looga buuxiyay goobtaada.
rel_16_change_1: Isku day tusaale tooshiye ah oo si buuxda u firfircoon oo abka shaqaalaha ah — keeshiye dhab ah, kayd, shaashadaha maareeyaha iyo gaarsiiyaha — bilaash, isdiiwaangelin la'aan, si toos ah bogga hore.
rel_16_change_2: Makhaayadaha, salaamada, dayactirka iyo warshadaha mid kastaa waxay tusaalaha ku helayaan shaashadooda dhabta ah (khariidadda miiska, jadwalka ballanta, sixirka scan-ka qalabka, qabashada wax-soo-saarka) halkii uu ka ahaan lahaa iibin caadi ah.
rel_16_change_3: Tirtir laan Iibinta Goobta → Laamaha — horay waxaad awoodi kartay oo keliya inaad magac beddesho, si aad u saarto majiro.
rel_16_change_4: Qoraal kooban oo ka yimid aasaasaha oo sharaxaya sababta AskBiz u jiro, oo bogga hore ku yaal.
rel_16_change_5: Bogga hore dib loo dhisay iyadoo la marinayo qaab telefoon-horreysiiye, Afrika-horreysiiye — camera-oo-kaash ah, EVC Plus iyo lacagta mobiilka horreysiisa.
rel_16_change_6: Tirooyinka tusaalaha badeecada (dakhli, gaarsiiye, tixraaca dalabka) hadda waxay ku muuqdaan lacagtaada iyo suuqaaga halkii ay had iyo jeer GBP ku ahaan lahaayeen.
rel_16_change_7: Isbarbardhigga "AskBiz iyo doorashooyinka kale" wuxuu tusayaa buug iyo kaash-mishiin qalab ah oo loogu talagalay booqdayaasha Kenya, Nigeria iyo Uganda, iyo Shopify/Power BI meelaha kale.
rel_16_change_8: Waxaa lagu beddelay astaamaha emoji-ga oo dhan bogga hore iyo horuoyimaha badeecada astaan-set joogto ah oo si hufan ugu muuqda qalab kasta.
rel_16_change_9: Qayb cusub oo "Meesha ay ka shaqeyso" oo si toos ah ugu xiraysa bogagga wadamada iyo noocyada ganacsiga — hadda waxay daboolaysaa Kenya, Nigeria, Uganda, Ghana, Tanzania iyo Koonfur Afrika.
rel_16_change_10: Cinwaanka bogga hore, sharraxaadda iyo xogta qaabaysan ayaa loo hagaajiyay muuqaalka raadinta Kenya, Nigeria iyo Uganda.
rel_16_change_11: Bogagga hore ee la turjumay (/es /fr /de /nl /ar) hadda si sax ah ayey isugu tilmaamayaan raadinta halkii ay dib ugu tilmaami lahaayeen bogga Ingiriisiga.
rel_16_change_12: Naaqiladda mobiilka waa la nadiifiyay — waxaa laga saaray xiriirka "Gal" ee ku celceliyay menu-ga.
rel_16_change_13: Manifeska abka la rakibi karo (PWA) iyo xogta qaabaysan ee bogga hore ayaa la cusbooneysiiyay si ay ula jaanqaadaan qaabka telefoon-horreysiiyaha.
rel_16_change_14: Heerarka qiimaha iyo miiska isbarbardhigga waxay mobiilka ku muuqan jireen tiirar cidhiidhi ah oo aan la akhrisan karin.
rel_16_change_15: "Ku daawo 60 ilbiriqsi" waxba wax faa'iido leh kuma xiran — hadda wuxuu furaa tusaalaha badeecada oo tooshiye ah.
rel_16_change_16: Bogag qaar waxay ku tilmaameen ku-dhejinta Iibinta Goobta (POS) inay "bilaash" tahay — waa ku-dhejin la iibsado oo laga bilaabo £5/kursi/bishii; qorshaha aasaasiga ah ee AskBiz weli waa bilaash inaad ku bilowdo.
rel_16_change_17: Qiimaha qorshaha Ganacsiga oo ku muuqda xogta qaabaysan lamaba jaanqaadin bogga qiimaha.
rel_16_change_18: Sawirka wadaagga bulshada ee bogga hore (oo ay isticmaalaan horuoyimaha xiriirka WhatsApp iyo Twitter) wuxuu soo celin jiray xiriir jaban.
rel_16_change_19: Booqdayaasha ka yimaada Kenya iyo Tanzania waxaa loo dirayay luqad aan la taageerin, taasoo jabinaysay xiriir kasta oo bogga hore.
rel_16_change_20: Cinwaanka bogga hore wuxuu odhan jiray "Kenya, Nigeria & Uganda" halka liiska wadamada ee hoosteeda ku yaal uu horay u daboolay lix wadan — waa la hagaajiyay si ay isula ekaadaan.
meta_description: Arag waxa cusub ee AskBiz — cusbooneysiinta badeecada, hagaajinta iyo saxidda.
hero_subtitle: Astaamo cusub, hagaajinno iyo saxidno — lagu cusbooneysiiyo sii-dayn kasta.
rel_15_summary: Doorarka kooxda & xakameynta gelitaanka, dib-u-naqshadaynta Sirdoonka Adeegga Guurka, saxidda kalsoonida sahamiyaha blog-ga, iyo saxidda i18n.
rel_15_change_0: Doorarka kooxda — lix door (Milkiile, Maamule, Falanqeeye, Xisaabiye, Iibsade, Daawade) oo leh miis oggolaansho oo dhexe; door kastaa wuxuu leeyahay gelitaan si cad loo qeexay oo daashboodhka, wada-hadalka AI, biilinta, ilaha xogta, POS, iyo maareynta kooxda
rel_15_change_1: Maareynta xubinta kooxda — ku casuun email, dib-u-dir casuumado dhacaya, si toos ah u beddel doorka xubinta, iyo ka saar xubnaha; wadooyinka API waxay xoojiyaan ilaaliyayaal door-ku-saleysan si ay Milkiilayaasha iyo Maamulayaasha keliya u casuumi ama u maamuli karaan
rel_15_change_2: Doorka Falanqeeyaha hadda wuxuu arki karaa bogga Biilinta — horay waxaa loo xaddiday Milkiilaha keliya
rel_15_change_3: Panel-ka kooxda dib loo naqshadeeyay — kaararka doorka oo ku jira shabag 3×2 oo leh astaamo SVG iyo kala sooc cad oo summad/sharraxaad ah; safafka xubnaha waxay tusayaan sawir-astaan xarafyada hore leh oo midab-doorka leh, summado door oo astaamo leh, iyo qaybo gaar ah oo Firfircoon / Sugaya aqbalaad ah
rel_15_change_4: Sahamiyaha blog-ga wuxuu socon jiray mawduuc 1 orod kasta halkii ay 5 ahaan lahaayeen — cilad slice(0,1) ah ayaa xaddidday doorashada mawduuca iyadoon loo eegin inta mawduuc ee la qiimeeyay
rel_15_change_5: Qoraallada blog-ga ee uu qoray wakiilka sahamiyaha waxay muujin jireen taariikho kala firidhsan (ilaa sannad hore) halkii ay ku qori lahaayeen taariikhdooda dhabta ah ee daabacaadda — qoraallada sahamiyaha hadda waxaa lagu ogaadaa qoraaga oo waxay ka gudbaan macquuliyada faafinta taariikhda pSEO
rel_15_change_6: Tab-ka Sirdoonka Adeegga Guurka dib loo naqshadeeyay — cabbiraadda dhibcaha wareegsan (qaabka hero-metric) waxaa lagu beddelay bar caafimaad oo horusocod ah oo cidhiidhi ah; astaamaha tab-ka emoji-ga waxaa lagu beddelay SVG; dhammaan midabbada indigo (#6366F1) ee sugan waxaa lagu beddelay astaamaha brand-ka; summadaha indhaha ee waaweyn waa la saaray
rel_15_change_7: Kaadhka Rarista & Gaarsiinta ee Guudmarka dib loo naqshadeeyay — xariiqda dhinaca bidix ee dhinaca waa la saaray; ku-dhufo kaadhka madhan (border + hoos-hadh) waxaa lagu beddelay isbeddel midabka xudduudda oo keliya; tirada dhibcaha waxaa laga soocay summadda iyadoo la isku toosiyay salka; emoji-ga waxaa lagu beddelay astaamo SVG; midabbada block-ga Xiriirka Xogta waxaa loo saxay astaamaha brand-ka
rel_15_change_8: Turjumaadaha kaadhka garaaca adeegga guurka oo tusaya furayaal aan la qaabeynin (logistics_pulsecard.title, logistics_pulsecard.active) luqad kasta — dhammaan lixda fayl luqadeed waxay lahaayeen heer duub magac-meel oo dheeraad ah oo aan xallinta i18n dhex mari karin
rel_15_change_9: Midabbada ku-dhufashada tallaabada degdegga ah ee tab-ka Adeegga Guurka waxay isticmaali jireen indigo astaanta AI (#6366F1 / #0891b2) — waxaa loo saxay var(--acc) tab-yada hoose ee Baxaya iyo Soo-galaba labadaba
rel_0_summary: Xoojinta hoggaansanaanta GDPR — xakameynta oggolaanshaha, hirgelinta haynta xogta, adeeg-is-siin DSAR macmiilka, Heshiis Habaynta Xogta, iyo qariska PII log-ga labada abka.
rel_0_change_0: Bogga Heshiiska Habaynta Xogta (/dpa) oo leh liiska hoos-habeeyaha — waxaa laga xiray siyaasadda arrimaha gaarka ah iyo cagaha bogga
rel_0_change_1: UI codsiga xogta-shaqsi ee macmiilka (DSAR) oo ku yaal bogga macaamiisha POS — dhoofi oo tirtir xogta shaqsi ee macmiilka marka la codsado, oo fulinaya xuquuqda gelitaanka iyo tirtiridda GDPR
rel_0_change_2: Oggolaansho isdiiwaangelin cad — abuurista koontada hadda waxay u baahan tahay heshiis cad oo siyaasadda arrimaha gaarka ah iyo shuruudaha ka hor intaanad sii wadin
rel_0_change_3: Cron toos ah oo haynta xogta (gdpr-retention) — wuxuu hirgeliyaa daaqadaha haynta oo tirtiraa xogta shaqsi ee la dhaafay muddadeeda haynta
rel_0_change_4: Banner oggolaanshaha POS, siyaasadda cookie, siyaasadda arrimaha gaarka ah, iyo bogagga shuruudaha ayaa lagu daray pos-askbiz si ay ula mid noqoto abka guud
rel_0_change_5: Google Analytics hadda waxaa laga xiray gadaal oggolaanshaha cookie — ma jiro script analytics oo shubmaya ilaa booqdaha uu ogolaado
rel_0_change_6: Guuritaanka maamulka amniga heerka safka (051_gdpr_governance_rls) oo la dabbaqay si loo xiro miisaska xogta shaqsi
rel_0_change_7: Warbixinta haynta xogta oo lagu jaanqaadiyay macquuliyada haynta dhabta ah si warbixintu u tusiso waxa cron-ku hirgeliyo
rel_0_change_8: Cron-ka haynta mar dambe kama qari-badiyo — kaliya diiwaannada run ahaantii dhaafay daaqadooda haynta ayaa la qariyaa
rel_0_change_9: Habaynta PIN-ka waa la xoojiyay — caawiye hash PIN oo la wadaago iyo xaddidaha heerka ee wadada OTP ee pos-askbiz, oo la mid ah abka guud
rel_0_change_10: Xogta shaqsi (PII) oo laga qariyay log-ga serverka ee wadooyinka dirista ogeysiiska iyo webhook-ka hoggaansanaanta Shopify
rel_0_change_11: Ka-gudbidda 'dev-test' ee wax-soo-saarka waxaa laga saaray cron-ka gdpr-retention — cron-ka mar dambe lama kicin karo iyadoon la haynin sir ansax ah oo wax-soo-saarka
rel_1_summary: Dib-u-hagaajinta la-heli-karka AI — bog isbarbardhig cusub, hero POS oo camera-horreysiiye ah, dib-u-qorista bogga hore, iyo saarista fariinta tijaabada 3-bilood ah.
rel_1_change_0: Bogga /compare — AskBiz iyo Shopify iyo Power BI: miis 12-saf ah oo astaamo ah, xariiq caddayn qiime, qayb xukun daacad ah, iyo sax cad oo tirada $199/bishii ee ku wareegaysa qaababka AI
rel_1_change_1: Hero bogga hore dib loo qoray: summadda hadda waxay akhrisaa “POS · KAYD · SIRDOONKA AI — HAL PLATFORM”, cinwaan “Dukaankaaga. Kaydkaaga. Dhammaan hal meel.”, qoraal-hoosaad wuxuu ku horreeyaa “Tababar la'aan. Dejin la'aan. Kaliya ku xir oo tag.”
rel_1_change_2: Bogga hore: qayb isbarbardhig saddex-tiir ah oo lagu daray inta u dhaxaysa bandhigga POS iyo qiimaha — kaararka Shopify iyo AskBiz iyo Power BI oo leh faa'iidooyin, cilado, iyo xukun daacad ah qalab kasta
rel_1_change_3: Bogga hore xariiq kalsooni qiime ah oo lagu daray hoosta CTA-yada hero: “Qorshaha bilaashka ah had iyo jeer diyaar ah · £19/bishii Growth · £39/bishii Business · waxaa ku jira nidaam POS oo buuxa”
rel_1_change_4: Hero Iibinta Goobta dib loo qoray si camera-horreysiiye ah: “Camerada ku jeedi. Taasi waa kaashkaaga.” oo leh summad POS · CAMERA-HORREYSIIYE iyo qoraal-hoosaad “Qori-baarid la'aan. Gelitaan gacan la'aan. Shopify looma baahna.”
rel_1_change_5: Fariinta tijaabada bilaashka ah ee 3-bilood waxaa laga saaray dhammaan meelaha isticmaaluhu arko — CTA bogga hore, summadda qaybta qiimaha, qoraallada qorshaha bogga qiimaha, CTA-yada bogga POS, hordhaca bogga biilinta, jirridda qaybta POS, badhamada tijaabada, jawaabta FAQ, iyo fariinta gelitaanka dhacay
rel_1_change_6: Sitemap: /compare oo lagu daray mudnaanta 0.9 oo leh dib-u-xaqiijin bille
rel_2_summary: Saxidda kalsoonida wakiilka blog-ga, dib-u-hagaajinta qiimeynta AI Discovery, sifayinta mawduuca blog-ga, iyo joogtaynta xaaladda Discovery Agent.
rel_2_change_0: Wakiillada blog-ga Victor, Carolyne iyo Ben waxay si aamusnaan ah u guuldareysteen gelitaanka DB — sababta aasaasiga ah waxay ahayd qiimayaal nooc gaar ah (blog_ea, blog_us, blog_mktg_africa) oo jebinaya xakameynta agent_content CHECK. Dhammaan wakiilladu hadda waxay isticmaalaan type: blog, iyagoo lagu kala saaray horgale run_id (blog_ea_*, blog_us_*, blog_mktg_africa_*)
rel_2_change_1: Tirada qoraallada wakiilka (sugaya / la daabacay / la diiday) oo 0 muujinaya tab-yada Victor, Carolyne iyo Ben — wadooyinka liiska hadda waxay ku shaandheeyaan horgale run_id halkii ay type ku shaandheyn lahaayeen, sidaas darteed qoraallada Alice si sax ah ayaa looga soocayaa wakiillada kale
rel_2_change_2: Ka dib marka orod wakiilku dhammaado, shaandhadu si toos ah ayey ugu beddeshaa La Daabacay si qoraallada cusub ee URL blog leh isla markiiba loo arko iyadoon la beddelin tab gacan
rel_2_change_3: Qaybta Mawduucyada Caanka ah ee Blog-ga hadda waa xog-ku-saleysan si buuxda — tirada iyo liiska mawduuca waxay ka yimaadaan xogta qoraalka dhabta ah, iyagoo beddelaya magacyada koox oo sugan oo aan la mid ahayn qiimayaasha DB
rel_2_change_4: Astaamaha kaadhka mawduuca blog-ga aan soo bixin — JSX astaanta waxaa lagu qeexay POPULAR_TOPICS laakiin waligeed looma marin lakabka soo-bixinta kaadhka
rel_2_change_5: Kaararka mawduuca blog-ga oo isku laabaya hal saf — globals.css wuxuu inline-flex ku dabbaqaa dhammaan walxaha <button>, taasoo ku qasabta caruurta kaadhka inay si toosan u socdaan. Waxaa lagu saxay flex-direction: column oo cad badhamada kaadhka
rel_2_change_6: Summadaha koox ee safafka qoraalka blog-ga waxay isticmaali jireen qoraal weyn + turxaaman — waxaa lagu beddelay dhibic midabaysan + summad 11px oo miisaan caadi ah
rel_2_change_7: Kaadhka AI Discovery Agent hadda wuxuu joogteeyaa xaaladda inta lagu jiro dib-u-cusbooneysiinta bogga isagoo isticmaalaya localStorage (fure: dac_audit_v2) — isla markiiba ayuu soo celiyaa marka la rakibo ka dibna wuxuu soo qaataa xog cusub gadaasha
rel_2_change_8: Xaaladda “Abuur manifes” ee Discovery Agent waxaa lumin jiray dib-u-cusbooneysiinta bogga — manifeska la abuuray hadda waxaa loo qoraa localStorage marka ay guulaysto si xaaladda La Liistay ay uga badbaado naaqiladda
rel_2_change_9: Qiimeynta hubinta AI Discovery waxaa loo cusbooneysiiyay qaab 10-dhibic ah: +4 marka URL endpoint uu soo celiyo 200, +2 marka xogta qaabaysan la habeeyo oo ansax tahay, +4 marka su'aasha baaritaanka ay soo celiso AskBiz HIT. Qaabkii hore wuxuu ku xaddidmi jiray 7/10 iyadoon loo eegin natiijooyinka baaritaanka
rel_2_change_10: Hubinta Discovery hadda waxay ku socodsiisaa su'aalaha baaritaanka dhammaan 6-da platform si isku mar ah (waxaa lagu xaddiday 4-tii hore), natiijooyinka baaritaanka waxay si toos ah ugu quudaan qiimeynta platform-ka
rel_3_summary: Nidaam ogeysiis caqli-gal ah, dabagalka lacag-bixinta Paystack, kaydinta kaydka POS, nadiifinta daashboodhka CFO, iyo sifayn naqshad blog + academy.
rel_3_change_0: Sanduuqa ogeysiiska abka gudihiisa — guuldarada lacag-bixinta, digniinaha dib-u-dalbashada, koobaha iibka maalinlaha ah, summadaha iib weyn, iyo caafimaadka xiriirka ilaha oo dhan waxay u shaqeeyaan sida ogeysiisyo
rel_3_change_1: Webhook Paystack ee abka guud — dhacdooyinka charge.success iyo charge.failed waxay cusbooneysiiyaan xaaladda lacag-bixinta oo abuuraan ogeysiisyo degdeg ah
rel_3_change_2: Qaybta Lacagaha la Helay — lacag-bixinnada dijitaalka ah ee la xaqiijiyay (EVC Plus, kaadh) hadda si gaar ah ayaa loo tusayaa oo ka duwan soo-celinta lacag-bixinta guuldareystay
rel_3_change_3: Daashboodhka Soo-celinta Lacag-bixinta — API u gaar ah lacag-bixinnada guuldareystay/la joojiyay oo leh tirakoob soo-celin iyo dabagal isku-day
rel_3_change_4: Badhanka Kaydinta ee alaabta kaydka ka dhammaaday — ka qari badeecooyinka digniinaha kaydka iyo Garaaca (Pulse) adigoon tirtirin

rel_3_change_6: Digniinaha caafimaadka xiriirka ilaha — digniin la-jaanqaadid duugoobay, digniin xiriir-go'ay, iyo xaqiijin xiriir cusub
rel_3_change_7: Ogeysiisyada koobaha iibka maalinlaha ah ee POS — dakhliga shalay, tirada macaamil ganacsi, iyo kala qaybinta lacag caddaan iyo dijitaal ah oo la keeno subax kasta
rel_3_change_8: Calaamadaha Garaaca (Pulse) ee la diiday hadda way joogtaaan dib-u-cusbooneysiinta bogga — aqoonsiyada calaamadda way deggan yihiin halkii ay dib u soo dhalan lahaayeen soo-shubasho kasta

rel_3_change_12: Lacag-bixinnada sugaya oo si khaldan loo muujiyay sida “Dib-u-isku-day” — API-ga dunning hadda wuxuu kaliya raadiyaa lacag-bixinnada run ahaantii guuldareystay

rel_4_change_0: Wadada Shopify OAuth waxay soo celisay 500 sababtoo ah doorsoome la isticmaalay ka hor caddaynta — ka hortagtay xiriirka dukaanka inta lagu jiro dib-u-eegista abka
rel_4_change_1: Qoraallada blog-ga ee leh slug aan ansax ahayn waxay soo celin jireen HTTP 200 halkii ay 404 ahaan lahaayeen — hadda si sax ah ayey u soo celiyaan 404 iyadoo la marinayo Next.js notFound()

rel_4_change_5: CTA bogga soo-dhawaynta oo laga beddelay “Bilow bilaash — kaadh looma baahna” ilaa “Bilow tijaabada bilaashka ah ee 3-bilood”
rel_4_change_6: Summadda kaadhka Growth ee qaybta qiimaha oo laga beddelay “Ugu caansan” ilaa “Tijaabo bilaash ah 3-bilood” oo leh gradient buluug ah
rel_4_change_7: CTA qorshaha Growth ee qaybta qiimaha oo loo cusbooneysiiyay “Bilow tijaabo bilaash ah” oo leh xiriir isdiiwaangelin toos ah
rel_4_change_8: Summadaha kalsoonida, qoraal-hoosaadka, iyo qoraal-hoosaadka juqraafiga oo dhan la cusbooneysiiyay si ay uga tarjumaan dallacaadda tijaabada bilaashka ah ee 3-bilood
rel_4_change_9: FAQ oo la cusbooneysiiyay si loo xuso tijaabada bilaashka ah ee 3-bilood ee Growth iyo POS
rel_5_summary: Tijaabooyin bilaash ah oo 3-bilood ah qorshaha Growth iyo Iibinta Goobta — kaadh looma baahna. Waxay u shaqeeyaan isticmaalayaasha Stripe iyo lacagta mobiilka labadaba.
rel_5_change_0: Tijaabo bilaash ah oo 3-bilood ah qorshaha Growth — astaamaha Growth oo buuxa (su'aalo aan xaddidnayn, warbixinta maalinlaha ah, ganacsiga bulshada, sirdoonka luminta macaamiisha) iyadoon kaadh hore laga baahna
rel_5_change_1: Tijaabo bilaash ah oo 3-bilood ah Iibinta Goobta — ilaa 5 kursi oo ku jira, kaadh ama lacagta mobiilka looma baahna
rel_5_change_2: Miis tijaabooyin oo ku jira database — wuxuu dabagalaa nooca tijaabada, taariikhaha bilowga/dhammaadka, iyo xaaladda beddelaadda isticmaale kasta
rel_5_change_3: API firfircoonaynta tijaabada — POST /api/billing oo leh ficil “start_trial” tijaabooyinka POS iyo Growth labadaba
rel_5_change_4: UI tijaabada bogga biilinta — badhamada bilowga isticmaalayaasha u-qalma, summadaha tijaabada firfircoon oo leh maalmaha hadhay, ogeysiisyada tijaabada dhacday
rel_5_change_5: Dabagalka beddelaadda tijaabada — webhook Stripe iyo callback PesaPal labaduba waxay tijaabooyinka u calaamadeeyaan sida la beddelay marka lacag-bixin la sameeyo
rel_5_change_6: Billing API GET hadda waxay soo qaadataa xaaladda tijaabada, si toos ah u dhammeysa tijaabooyinka, oo soo celisaa macluumaadka tijaabada frontend-ka
rel_5_change_7: Tijaabada POS waxay xiddaa tallaabada kursiga ilaa 5 kursi oo leh summad “ku jira tijaabada” — isticmaalayaasha bixiyaa waxay yeelan karaan ilaa 50
rel_5_change_8: Hubinta dhacitaanka tijaabada Growth hadda si sax ah ayey u maareysaa isticmaalayaasha PesaPal-ku bixiyay (waxay hubin jirtay oo keliya rukumaadka Stripe)
rel_5_change_9: usePlan hook oo lagu kordhiyay interface TrialInfo — qaybuhu waxay hubin karaan trial.active, trial.daysLeft, trial.expired
rel_5_change_10: Dhacitaanka tijaabada Growth wuxuu si khaldan hoos ugu dhigi lahaa rukumaadka PesaPal/lacagta mobiilka ee aan lahayn aqoonsi rukumaad Stripe
rel_6_summary: Bogga suuqgeynta Iibinta Goobta, taageerada lacagta caalamiga ah, tusaalooyin tooshiye ah, qiimeynta POS ee juqraafi-garasho, iyo API adeegga guurka oo buuxa.
rel_6_change_0: Bogga suuqgeynta /point-of-sale — hero, tusaale scan camera-horreysiiye ah, shabag 12-astaan ah, miis isbarbardhig, iyo qiime kursi-kasta
rel_6_change_1: Tusaale POS camera-horreysiiye ah — telefoon jilitaan ah oo firfircoon oo tusaya scan → aqoonso → dambiil → bixi 4 tallaabo oo leh dabagal horumar
rel_6_change_2: Hagitaanka dejinta shaqaalaha — tusaale qaab duub-shaashad oo tooshiye ah oo tusaya sida keeshiye loogu daro wax ka yar 2 daqiiqo oo leh gelitaan OTP
rel_6_change_3: Taageerada lacagta caalamiga ah ee /point-of-sale — 150+ lacag, deggenaansho, lacagta mobiilka (EVC Plus, MTN, Airtel), iyo 10 nidaam canshuur (UK VAT, US Sales Tax, FIRS, KRA, GST, SARS, UAE VAT, AU GST, EU OSS, Custom)
rel_6_change_5: Bogagga /benchmarks iyo /case-studies hadda way tooshiye yihiin — waxay soo celin jireen 404 (faylalka aan la raad-raacin waa la saxay)
rel_6_change_6: Qaybta qiimaha — kaadhka ku-dhejinta POS hadda waxaa la tusayaa marka hore ka hor heerarka sirdoonka; wuxuu leeyahay tiirar astaan iyo laba CTA
rel_6_change_7: Qiimeynta POS ee juqraafi-garasho — qiimaha kursiga POS hadda waa la deggenaysiiyay wadan kasta (KSh 600, ₦2,500, R 90, ₹400, £5, $5, iwm) meelaha qiimaha oo dhan iyo FAQ
rel_6_change_8: Qiimaha qorshaha Growth iyo Business hadda si sax ah ayey u isticmaalaan lacagta la juqraafi-garto bogga soo-dhawaynta (waxaa la sugi jiray £ iyadoon loo eegin wadanka)
rel_6_change_9: /free-tools/break-even-calculator iyo /free-tools/vat-calculator waxay soo celin jireen 404 — faylalka waa la raad-raacay oo la geeyay
rel_6_change_10: Kaadhka qiimaha POS oo tusaya £5 isticmaalayaasha Kenya halkii KSh 600 — aqoonsiga lacagta hadda waa la xiray dhammaad-ilaa-dhammaad
rel_7_summary: Qalab bilaash ah oo cusub, sheekooyin dhab ah, cabbiraadaha warshadaha, CTA-yo juqraafi-garasho, iyo qiimaha kursiga POS bogga soo-dhawaynta.
rel_7_change_0: Xisaabiyaha VAT — wuxuu taageeraa 30+ wadan oo leh heerar VAT oo si toos ah loo buuxiyay iyo xisaabinta VAT gadaal-u-jeeda
rel_7_change_1: Xisaabiyaha Isku-dheelitirka — 12 lacag, jaantus tooshiye ah, iyo xaaladaha qiime-haddii
rel_7_change_2: Qaybta Sheekooyinka Dhabta ah — 6 sheeko adduun-dhab ah oo tusaya sida ganacsiyada yaryar u isticmaalaan AskBiz qaybaha oo dhan
rel_7_change_3: Cabbiraadaha Warshadaha Ganacsiyada Yaryar — isbarbardhig faa'iidooyinka, koritaanka, AOV, iyo KPI-yada 8 qaybood (rubuc kastaba la cusbooneysiiyo)
rel_7_change_4: CTA-yo juqraafi-garasho — bogga soo-dhawaynta wuxuu la qabsadaa cinwaanka iyo dallacaadda booqdayaasha ka yimaada Singapore, Australia, Nigeria, iyo kuwo kale
rel_7_change_5: Banner dallacaad suuqa Afrika — si toos ah ayey u soo bandhigtaa koodhka qiimo-dhimista ASKBIZ-AFRICA wadamada u qalma
rel_7_change_6: Qaybta qiimaha hadda waxay tusaysaa qiime kursi POS oo cad (£5/kursi/bishii ku-dhejin) heerarka Growth iyo Business
rel_7_change_7: Naaqiladda mega-menu oo la cusbooneysiiyay oo leh hoos-u-dhac Kheyraadka oo ku xiraya dhammaan qaybaha cusub
rel_7_change_8: Cagaha oo la cusbooneysiiyay oo leh xiriirrada Sheekooyinka Dhabta ah iyo Cabbiraadaha
rel_7_change_9: Sitemap oo la ballaariyay oo leh dhammaan wadooyinka cusub si loo hagaajiyo daboolka SEO
rel_8_summary: Waxaa la soo bandhigayaa AskBiz POS — nidaam iibinta goobta oo si buuxda isugu dhafan oo leh scan camera, maareynta kaydka, doorarka shaqaalaha, iyo BI wakhtiga-dhabta ah.
rel_8_change_0: AskBiz POS — nidaam iibinta goobta ku dhisan oo laga geli karo telefoon casri ah ama tablet kasta
rel_8_change_1: Scan qori-baar iyo tiir-qiime camera-ku-saleysan oo isticmaalaya camerada telefoonkaaga — qalab dheeraad ah looma baahna
rel_8_change_2: Habka iibin oo buuxa: scan, dambiil, lacag-bixin (lacag caddaan ama kaadh), iyo rasiid wax ka yar 60 ilbiriqsi
rel_8_change_3: Gaarsiinta rasiidka WhatsApp — macaamiishu waxay isla markiiba helayaan caddayn dijitaal ah oo iibsi
rel_8_change_4: Maareynta shaqaalaha oo leh gelitaan door-ku-saleysan (doorarka keeshiye iyo kayd) iyo gelitaan xiriir sixir ah
rel_8_change_5: Maareynta kaydka wakhtiga-dhabta ah oo leh digniinaha kayd-hooseeya iyo kayd-dhammaaday
rel_8_change_6: Habaynta soo-celinta buuxda iyo qayb ah oo leh dabagal sabab iyo raad hubin
rel_8_change_7: Wax-ka-beddellada macaamil ganacsi iyo saxidno oo leh diiwaangelin hubin oo dhammaystiran
rel_8_change_8: Xisaabinta VAT macaamil ganacsi kasta oo leh diiwaan-hayn dijitaal ah oo MTD la jaanqaadi karta
rel_8_change_9: Dhoofinta macaamil ganacsi 30-maalmood ah xisaabiyayaasha (qaab CSV)
rel_8_change_10: Xogta POS waxay si toos ah u quudisaa daashboodhka, Warbixinta Maalinlaha ah, Garaaca Ganacsiga, iyo wada-hadalka AI
rel_8_change_11: Taageerada POS meelo-badan oo leh shaqaale, kayd, iyo warbixin meel-kasta
rel_8_change_12: Qaab offline ah — sii wad habaynta iibinta lacag caddaan inta lagu jiro go' internet oo kooban
rel_8_change_13: 25 maqaal Academy oo cusub oo ku saabsan POS iyo sirdoonka tafaariiqda
rel_8_change_14: 22 maqaal Xarunta Caawimaadda oo cusub oo ay ku jiraan hagayaal hoggaansanaan (HMRC, GDPR, sharciga rasiidka)
rel_8_change_15: Wado waxbarasho “Xeeladaha POS Tafaariiqda” — laga bilaabo iibkii ugu horreeyay ilaa sirdoon buuxa
rel_8_change_16: Tixraaca isku-dhafka POS ee Xarunta Caawimaadda oo la cusbooneysiiyay (horay CSV-kaliya ahaa Zettle/Square)
rel_9_summary: Dib-u-hagaajin weyn oo xarunta caawimaadda oo leh raadin macne, kor-u-qaadid caqli-gal ah, iyo widget caawimaad abka gudihiisa.
rel_9_change_0: Widget caawimaad sabaynaya oo abka gudihiisa — talooyin maqaal macne oo ku saleysan bogga hadda jira
rel_9_change_1: Isbuuxin tooshiye ah oo raadin oo leh talooyinka cinwaanka maqaalka iyo mawduuca
rel_9_change_3: Gaaban CMD+K si loo diiradsado raadinta caawimaadda meel kasta
rel_9_change_4: Summad “Cusub” maqaallada la cusbooneysiiyay 45-kii maalmood ee la soo dhaafay
rel_9_change_5: Kor-u-qaadid caqli-gal ah ka dib jawaab-celin qiimeyn-hoose — email, ballan wicitaan, FAQ
rel_9_change_6: Qaybaha sababta “Aan waxtar lahayn”: Aan sax ahayn, Duugoobay, Farsamo aad u badan, Macluumaad maqan
rel_9_change_7: Summad maqaalka “ugu dambeyntii la xaqiijiyay” oo tusaya bisha iyo sanadka dib-u-eegista
rel_9_change_8: Qaybta bulshada ee guriga caawimaadda: fadhi-hadal, wicitaan taageero, email, FAQ
rel_9_change_9: Banner xaalad oo ku saabsan ku-dhawaaqista dhacdooyinka dhammaan bogagga caawimaadda
rel_9_change_10: Bar horumar akhrin maqaal iyo badhanka kor-ku-noqoshada
rel_9_change_11: Guji-si-aad-u-koobiyeyso koodhka isku dhex jira ee maqaallada
rel_9_change_12: Taageerada gelinta fiidiyoowga maqaallada leh hage fiidiyoow
rel_9_change_13: Muuqaalka Print/PDF wuxuu qariyaa naaqiladda iyo dhinaca si wax-soo-saar nadiif ah loo helo
rel_10_summary: Hagaajinta waxqabadka daashboodhka iyo saxidda kalsoonida la-jaanqaadinta Shopify.
rel_10_change_0: Waqtiga rarista daashboodhka waxaa lagu dhimay ~40% koontooyinka leh 3+ ilo oo la xiray
rel_10_change_1: La-jaanqaadinta dalabka Shopify hadda si toos ah ayey dib isku dayaysaa marka ay dhacdo cilad heerka-xaddidan
rel_10_change_2: Waxaa la saxay cilad ay tirooyinka dakhliga u muuqan karaan $0 maanta
rel_10_change_3: Waxaa la xalliyay dhibaato ay shaandhooyinka taariikhda aysan joogteyn dib-u-cusbooneysiinta bogga
rel_11_summary: Hagaajinta saxnaanta saadaasha iyo sifayn UI yar.
rel_11_change_0: Qaabka saadaasha hadda wuxuu ku daraa isbeddellada xilliyeed si saadaal sax ah loo helo
rel_11_change_1: Weydii AI hadda wuxuu xasuustaa macnaha su'aalaha dabagalka ah ee isla fadhi
rel_11_change_2: Waxaa la saxay badhanka dhoofinta oo aan ka shaqeynin Firefox 124
rel_11_change_3: Waxaa la xalliyay is-dulsaarnaan dhinaca shaashadaha ka cidhiidhi badan 375px
rel_12_summary: Waxaa la soo saaray Qalabka Ganacsiga v2 oo leh isku-dhafyo cusub iyo dhinac qalab dib loo naqshadeeyay.
rel_12_change_0: Qalabka Ganacsiga v2 — dhinac dib loo naqshadeeyay oo leh raadin iyo kuwa la jecel yahay
rel_12_change_1: Isku-dhafka Xero hadda wuxuu taageeraa koontooyin lacag-badan
rel_12_change_2: Widget cusub “Garaaca Faa'iidada” oo ku yaal daashboodhka guriga
rel_12_change_3: Isku-dhafka Google Analytics hadda wuxuu soo qaataa xogta fadhi iyo beddelaad
rel_12_change_4: Waxaa laga saaray soo-dejiyaha CSV hore — waxaa lagu beddelay sixirka Soo-dejinta Xogta cusub
rel_13_change_0: Waxaa la cusbooneysiiyay maktabadda xaqiijinta si loo xalliyo laba CVE oo darnaan-hooseeya
rel_13_change_1: Waxaa la saxay tilmaamayaasha jaantuska oo ka baaba'aya qalabka taabashada
rel_13_change_2: Waxaa la xalliyay dhibaato ay isticmaalayaasha la casuumay ku dhici karaan shaashad madhan ka dib isdiiwaangelinta
rel_14_summary: Isku-dhafka TikTok Shop, saxidda sirdoonka CFO, calaamadaha khariidadda POS, iyo kalsoonida wakiilka sahamiyaha.
rel_14_change_0: TikTok Shop — ku xir dukaankaaga TikTok Shop iyadoo la marinayo habka QR code OAuth 2.0; scan koodhka telefoonkaaga, ansix gelitaanka, oo dalabkaagu si toos ah ayuu u jaanqaadaa
rel_14_change_1: Saadaasha CFO — dakhliga la saadaaliyay iyo faa'iidada saafiga ah hadda waxay tusayaan tirooyin marka aad haysato 1 bilood oo taariikh ah halkii ay tusi lahaayeen jiibbo; badhamada horizon (1M / 3M / 6M / 12M) hadda si muuqata ayey u beddelaan wadarta la saadaaliyay
rel_14_change_2: Daashboodhka CFO — kaadhka KPI oo laga beddelay 'Socodka Lacagta Saafiga ah' ilaa 'Faa'iidada Saafiga ah' si sax ah u muujiya waxa tiradu matalaayo
rel_14_change_3: Isbarbardhigga P&L — muddada isbarbardhigga faa'iidada saafiga ah hadda waxaa ku jira kharashaadka la raad-raacay si tirada 'iyo muddadii hore' ay u noqoto isbarbardhig cadaalad ah oo tufaax-iyo-tufaax ah
rel_14_change_4: Kaararka calaamadda cimilada suuqa — waxaa la saxay kaararka tusaya sannado (2025, 2026) ama cabbiraadaha badeecada (500 oo ka timid '500ml') sida qiimaha cinwaanka; kaararka qiimaha hadda waxay soo saaraan tirooyin lacag-ku-xiran, kaararka wadadana waxay tusaan Caadi / Sare / Carqalad halkii ay tusi lahaayeen tiro aan macno lahayn
rel_14_change_5: Su'aalaha ilaha cimilada suuqa — ka dib kaydinta jawaab il, widget-ku hadda wuxuu u gudbaa su'aasha xigta halkii uu ku barafowin lahaa xaqiijinta la kaydiyay
rel_14_change_6: Khariidadda POS — calaamadaha goobta GPS hadda si hufan ayey u soo baxaan marka hore; waxaa la saxay xaalad tartan ah oo maktabadda Leaflet ay dhammaysay bilowga ka dib wicitaanka sawirka calaamadda
rel_14_change_7: Tab-ka Kharashaadka — shaandheeyaha muddada taariikhda (Maanta, Toddobaadkan, Bishan iwm) hadda si sax ah ayey u shaandheeyaa rasiidada iyo kharashaadka si ay ula jaanqaadaan muddada la doortay
rel_14_change_8: Tab-ka Kharashaadka — waxaa laga saaray emoji camera oo laba-jibbaaran oo ka soo muuqan jiray badhanka Scan Rasiidka mobiilka
rel_14_change_9: Wakiillada sahamiyaha — Maya iyo Carolyne hadda waxay raadiyaan 5 mawduuc orod kasta halkii ay 1 ahaan lahaayeen, taasoo si weyn u kordhisa fursadda helitaanka sirdoonka suuqa ee ku habboon
rel_14_change_10: Wakiillada sahamiyaha — waxaa la saxay 'Cilad aan la garanayn' oo ka soo muuqan jiray log-ga wakiilka marka sahamiye uu ka boodo sababtoo ah horay ayuu maanta u orday; log-ga hadda wuxuu tusayaa sabab bood oo cad
rel_14_change_11: Qalabka horeeg POS — Qiimaha Dhulka Gaadhay hadda si sax ah ayuu u muuqdaa alaabta POS xitaa marka goobta qiimaha kharashka ay tahay null
rel_16_change_21: Emailada soo-dhawaynta iyo dib-u-xiriirinta, oo leh iska-diiwaangelin hal-guji dir kasta.
